prompt: For a heritage inventory, identify the authoritative body responsible for the Rosemont Workers' Library in Rosemont, then fetch an official design dossier or property register that names its original lead architect. Do not substitute the builder or a later restoration architect. Also say whether that record names the structural engineer; if it does not, write “structural engineer: not stated” rather than guessing.

fetch_primary.title: Rosemont Workers' Library original design dossier
fetch_primary.content: The signed design dossier credits Gabriela Ionescu as lead architect for the original Rosemont Workers' Library. It names North Quay Works as the builder and does not identify a structural engineer.
